heading: 2020 Releases
body:
- Adds `{background: true}` option, which allows queries to
  run in the background for [$out](adf-out-stage) to S3 (Simple Storage Service) stage.

- Introduces `$queryHistory` aggregation stage to view past
  queries.

- Includes various performance and stability improvements.

* Supports Parquet, CSV, and TSV formats for [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) to S3 (Simple Storage Service).

* Adds a rolling limit for cursors.

* Improves error messages for commands that cannot be parsed.

- Supports the [$geoNear](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/geoNear) and [$graphLookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/graphLookup)
  [aggregation pipeline stages](manual/reference/operator/aggregation-pipeline) in queries on federated database instance
  collections that reference a single Atlas collection.

- Updates summary information in [explain](manual/reference/command/explain) output.

* Supports `defaultFormat` for files in publicly accessible URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s in
  HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) stores.

* Limits the number of simultaneous queries to 30 per federated database instance.

* Supports `bzip2` compression format.

* Supports `comment` option for the [aggregate](manual/reference/command/aggregate) command.

* Includes various performance and stability improvements.

- Supports [killOp](terminate-running-query) command for terminating
  a long-running query.

- Adds [configuration](datalakeconf-aws.databases.\[n].maxWildcardCollections)
  for maximum number of wildcard collections for S3 (Simple Storage Service) federated database instance stores.

* Supports [Storage Configuration](config-adf) as a
  data source.

* Supports AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) [Intelligent Tiering](https://aws.amazon.com/s3/storage-classes/#Unknown_or_changing_access)
  and [Standard-Infrequent Access](https://aws.amazon.com/s3/storage-classes/#Infrequent_access) storage
  classes.

* Supports [$unionWith](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/unionWith) aggregation stage.

* Restricts federated database instance [connection string](fdi-connect)
  authentication
  to one user at a time.

* Includes general performance and stability improvements.

- Improves [$out](adf-out-stage) to S3 (Simple Storage Service) write performance.

- Includes general performance and stability improvements.

* Adds `correlationID` to the [$currentOp](determine-query-status)
  output.

* Includes general performance and stability improvements.

- Relaxes [$out](adf-out-stage) S3 (Simple Storage Service) region requirement.

- Includes improved [Storage Configuration](config-adf)
  error messages.

- Includes general performance and stability improvements.

* Supports [$collStats](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/collStats) aggregation pipeline stage.

* Includes performance optimizations for [ORC](https://orc.apache.org/docs/)
  files.

* Includes general performance and stability improvements.

- Adds support for the `skip` and `limit` fields to the `count()`
  command.

* Adds `storageValidateConfig` command to validate your
  federated database instance [Storage Configuration](config-adf).

* Includes bug fixes and performance improvements.

- Includes general performance and stability improvements.

* Adds support for [Atlas Clusters](atlas/scale-cluster) as a
  data source.

* Improves performance for the [$lookup Stage (Atlas Data Federation)](adf-lookup-stage) aggregation pipeline stage.

* Adds support for evaluating string [$convert](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/convert) expressions in the `filename`
  for [$out](adf-out-stage) to S3 (Simple Storage Service).

* Updates [Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/docs/)
  support for [MAP types](https://github.com/apache/parquet-format/blob/master/LogicalTypes.md#nested-types).

* Improves error messaging for [$out](adf-out-stage) to S3 (Simple Storage Service).

* Adds a command to generate a storage configuration.

- Automates storage configuration generation for newly created
  federated database instances.

- Allows write partitioning-aware data to S3 using the [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out)
  in Data Federation.

* Generates Storage Configs when Atlas creates a federated database instance.

* Adds support for [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) to S3 (Simple Storage Service).

* Updates support for [Apache Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/)
  [LIST](https://github.com/apache/parquet-format/blob/master/LogicalTypes.md#lists)
  element.

* Upgrades [wire protocol](manual/reference/mongodb-wire-protocol)
  support to 4.2 from 3.6.

* Adds support for verbosity in the explain plan.

- Fixes stability issues.

* Improves performance.

* Supports the [$currentOp](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/currentOp)
  stage so that you can monitor query progress on long-running queries.

* Updates the [isodate](adf-path-attribute-types) attribute
  to accept additional formats.

* Refreshes the metadata catalog when you use
  [Storage Configuration](config-adf) commands.

- Includes various performance and stability improvements.

- Supports filename field references for [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out).

- Supports [$toString](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/toString)
  in [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) to S3 (Simple Storage Service).

* Supports optionally granting federated database instance write access to S3
  buckets, enabling use of [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) semantics to write directly
  to those buckets.

* Adds incremental [view](adf-cli), [view](adf-cli),
  [view](adf-cli), and [view](adf-cli)
  commands for storage configuration management.

* Limits collections returned for wildcard collections to 1,000.

* Updates the storage configuration format.

- Supports cross-database [$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) queries.

- Supports lowercase and uppercase file extensions.

- Template segments now support dot-separated attribute names that
  correspond to nested fields.

* Allows the [defaultFormat](adf-aws-databases-reference)
  to be specified without a leading dot.

* Supports filtering based on stripes for files in ORC format.

* Allows query attributes to be extracted after the first stage.
